data.biography: Janusz Chabior (ur. 17 lutego 1963 w Legnicy) – polski aktor teatralny, telewizyjny i filmowy.  Janusz Chabior jest kojarzony przez widzów przede wszystkim z ról postaci z kryminalnego półświatka, a także policjantów i oficerów SB. W latach 1991-1999 występował na deskach teatru im. Heleny Modrzejewskiej jako adept. W 2000 roku udało mu się zdać egzamin eksternistyczny. 6 lat później dołączył do grona aktorów warszawskiego Teatru Rozmaitości. Po raz pierwszy na ekranie pojawił się w roli Władeczka we francusko-polskiej produkcji "Magneto" u boku Jerzego Zelnika i Jana Nowickiego. Kolejne głośne produkcje z jego udziałem to znienawidzona przez widzów komedia "Gulczas, a jak myślisz?", gdzie wcielił się detektywa Jakubowskiego i więzienny dramat "Symetria". Systematycznie pojawiał się w wielu popularnych serialach taki jak: "Adam i Ewa", "Świat według Kiepskich" i "PitBull". Reżyser "PitBulla", Patryk Vega okazał się mieć spory wpływ na dalszy przebieg kariery Chabiora. W 2015 roku aktor wystąpił u niego w roli pułkownika Mariana Bońki w filmie "Służby specjalne" i serialu pod tym samym tytułem. Jego kreacja byłego oficera SB została nagrodzona Złotym szczeniakiem za najlepszą drugoplanową rolę męską na Festiwalu Aktorstwa Filmowego im. Tadeusza Szymkowa. Od tamtej pory Chabior stał się jednym z ulubionych aktorów Vegi. Współpracowali razem przy takich produkcjach jak "Hans Kloss. Stawka większa niż śmierć", "Botoks" czy "Kobiety mafii". Od 2011 roku występuje również w produkowanym przez TVP serialu "Komisarz Alex", gdzie wciela się w postać patologa Leona Bergera. Młodsi widzowie kojarzą głos Janusza Chabiora z roli Włóczykija w animacji "Muminki w pogoni za kometą".  [Filmweb.pl]
data.name: Janusz Chabior

data.biography:
鲍大志，中国北京人民艺术剧院话剧演员，毕业于北京电影学院，与梁冠华、王姬、宋丹丹是同班同学。

　　1977年，出演个人首部电影《我们是八路军》。1994年，由古典名著改编的电视剧《三国演义》播出，鲍大志饰演中年汉献帝。1998年，主演生活剧《贫嘴张大民的幸福生活》，饰演张大军。2003年，主演的金庸武侠剧《射雕英雄传》播出，在其中饰演完颜洪烈。2006年，与吴樾等合作主演抗战题材情景喜剧《地下交通站》，饰演鼎香楼掌柜孙友福。

　　2010年，在《二号交通站》中再次饰演孙友福。2014年，在北京人艺话剧《吴王金戈越王剑》中饰演文种。2018年，参演古装剧《鹤唳华亭》。2019年，参演话剧《杜甫》。2019年12月8日，获得中国“星锐榜”艺术传承盛典“德艺双馨”饯行大使荣誉。2020年9月16日，特邀出演由许东监制、李田执导的电视剧《光阴里的故事》，饰演勤勉认真的车厂师傅徐叔。2021年3月，参演中国人民艺术剧院大型历史话剧《吴王金戈越王剑》，饰演大夫文种。
data.name: 鲍大志

data.biography:
鮑大志，中國北京人民藝術劇院話劇演員，畢業於北京電影學院，與梁冠華、王姬、宋丹丹是同班同學。

1977 年，出演個人首部電影《我們是八路軍》。1994 年，由古典名著改編的電視劇《三國演義》播出，鮑大志飾演中年漢獻帝。1998 年，主演生活劇《貧嘴張大民的幸福生活》，飾演張大軍。2003 年，主演的金庸武俠劇《射鵰英雄傳》播出，在其中飾演完顏洪烈。2006 年，與吳樾等合作主演抗戰題材情景喜劇《地下交通站》，飾演鼎香樓掌櫃孫友福。

2010 年，在《二號交通站》中再次飾演孫友福。2014 年，在北京人藝話劇《吳王金戈越王劍》中飾演文種。2018 年，參演古裝劇《鶴唳華亭》。2019 年，參演話劇《杜甫》。2019 年 12 月 8 日，獲得中國“星鋭榜”藝術傳承盛典“德藝雙馨”餞行大使榮譽。2020 年 9 月 16 日，特邀出演由許東監製、李田執導的電視劇《光陰裏的故事》，飾演勤勉認真的車廠師傅徐叔。2021 年 3 月，參演中國人民藝術劇院大型歷史話劇《吳王金戈越王劍》，飾演大夫文種。
data.name: 鮑大志

data.biography:
Lupita Amondi Nyong'o (born 1 March 1983) is a Kenyan-Mexican actress and author. She began her career in Hollywood as a production assistant. In 2008, she made her acting debut with the short film East River and subsequently returned to Kenya to star in the television series Shuga (2009–2012). In 2009, she wrote, produced and directed the documentary In My Genes. She then pursued a master's degree in acting from the Yale School of Drama.

She had her first feature film role as Patsey in 12 Years a Slave (2013), for which she received critical acclaim and won several awards, including the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress. She became the first Kenyan and Mexican actress to win an Academy Award. She made her Broadway debut as a teenage orphan in the play Eclipsed (2015), for which she was nominated for a Tony Award for Best Actress in a Play. She went on to perform a motion capture role as Maz Kanata in the Star Wars sequel trilogy (2015–2019) and a lead voice role as Raksha in The Jungle Book (2016). Her career progressed with her role as Nakia in the Marvel Cinematic Universe superhero film Black Panther (2018) and her starring role in Jordan Peele's critically acclaimed horror film Us (2019).

In addition to acting, she supports historic preservation. She is vocal about preventing sexual harassment and working for women's and animal rights. In 2014, she was named the most beautiful woman by People. She has also written a children's book named Sulwe (2019), which became a number-one New York Times Best-Seller. Also in 2019, she narrated the Discovery Channel docu-series Serengeti, which earned her a Primetime Emmy Award nomination for Outstanding Narrator. She was named among Africa's "50 Most Powerful Women" by Forbes in 2020.

data.name: Lupita Nyong'o

data.biography: Lupita Amondi Nyong'o es una actriz, directora de cine y videoclips mexicana-keniata. Saltó a la fama en 2013 gracias a la película 12 años de esclavitud, del director británico Steve Rodney McQueen, por la que fue aclamada por la crítica. Ganó el Óscar a la mejor actriz de reparto y el Premio SAG a la mejor actriz de reparto, y fue nominada al Globo de Oro a la mejor actriz de reparto y al BAFTA a la mejor actriz de reparto por dicha película, entre otros premios internacionales.

Lupita Amondi Nyong’o (* 1. März 1983 in Mexiko-Stadt) ist eine kenianische Schauspielerin und Filmemacherin. Für ihre darstellerische Leistung einer Sklavin im Film 12 Years a Slave wurde sie bei der Oscarverleihung 2014 mit dem Oscar als beste Nebendarstellerin ausgezeichnet. 2020 wurde sie vom Magazin Forbes eine der 50 mächtigsten Frauen Afrikas genannt.

Sie studierte in den Vereinigten Staaten am Hampshire College und beendete ihr Studium dort mit einem Abschluss in Film- und Theaterwissenschaften. Danach arbeitete sie bei der Produktion verschiedener Filme mit, unter anderem Der ewige Gärtner (2005) und Namesake – Zwei Welten, eine Reise (2006). 2008 spielte sie in Marc Greys Kurzfilm East River die Hauptrolle. Anschließend kehrte sie nach Kenia zurück, wo sie eine Rolle in der Fernsehserie Shuga übernahm.

2009 entstand der Dokumentarfilm In My Genes über das Leben der kenianischen Albinos, für den sie das Drehbuch schrieb und auch als Regisseurin und Produzentin verantwortlich zeichnete.

Es folgte ein Studium an der Yale School of Drama, wo sie auch in mehreren Theaterinszenierungen auftrat. Direkt im Anschluss erhielt sie die Rolle der Patsey in Steve McQueens Filmdrama 12 Years a Slave. Die Rolle brachte ihr zahlreiche Auszeichnungen ein, darunter den Oscar als beste Nebendarstellerin, den Chicago Film Critics Association Award und den Critics’ Choice Movie Award sowie eine Nominierung für den Golden Globe als beste Nebendarstellerin. Nyong’o wurde daraufhin vor allem in den USA große mediale Aufmerksamkeit zuteil, sie wurde für die Titelblätter großer Modemagazine wie Vogue und Glamour fotografiert und als Stilikone bezeichnet.

Am 2. Juni 2014 wurde bekannt, dass sie für die Rolle der Maz Kanata in Star Wars: Das Erwachen der Macht, dessen Veröffentlichung im Dezember 2015 erfolgte, verpflichtet wurde. Auch an den Fortsetzungen, die 2017 und 2019 veröffentlicht wurden, war sie beteiligt. 2018 sah man sie erstmals in der Rolle der Kriegerin Nakia im Marvel-Film Black Panther. Sie war auch in der Fortsetzung Black Panther: Wakanda Forever (2022) zu sehen.

Bereits 2014 sicherte sich Nyong’o die Rechte an der Verfilmung des Romans Americanah der nigerianischen Schriftstellerin Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie. In der TV-Mini-Serie wird sie Ifemelu, die Protagonistin, spielen.

Люпіта Ніонґо — кенійська акторка і режисер, володарка премії «Оскар» за найкращу жіночу роль другого плану у фільмі «12 років рабства» (2013).

Народилася в Мексиці, але виросла в Кенії, звідки родом її батьки.

Вона переїхала в США, де вивчала акторську майстерність в Єльському університеті, який закінчила зі ступенем бакалавра мистецтв. Паралельно з навчанням Ніонґо виступала в театральних постановках, а також працювала в команді персоналу на зйомках кінофільмів.

Як акторка повнометражного кіно Ніонґо дебютувала в 2013 році у фільмі «12 років рабства», де зіграла рабиню Петсі — основного жіночого персонажа. На черговій церемонії «Оскар» вона була удостоєна нагороди за найкращу жіночу роль другого плану у цьому фільмі.

У квітні 2014 року журнал People помістив Ніонґо на перше місце в свій щорічний список найкрасивіших жінок світу.
data.name: Люпіта Ніонґо

data.biography: Lupita Amondi Nyong'o (Mexico City, 1 de março de 1983) é uma atriz e autora queniana-mexicana.  Ela começou sua carreira em Hollywood como assistente de produção.  Em 2008, ela fez sua estréia como atriz com o curta-metragem East River e, posteriormente, retornou ao Quênia para estrelar a série de televisão Shuga (2009-2012).  Em 2009, escreveu, produziu e dirigiu o documentário In My Genes.  Ela então fez um mestrado em atuação na Yale School of Drama.  Ela teve seu primeiro papel no cinema como Patsey em 12 Anos de Escravidão (2013), pelo qual recebeu elogios da crítica e ganhou vários prêmios, incluindo o Oscar de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante.

ولدت لوبيتا نيونجو في مكسيكو سيتي بالمكسيك لأبوين من كينيا في عام 1983، ونشأت وترعرعت في كينيا. كان والدها وزيراً سابقاً للخدمات الطبية وكان قد ترشح لعضوية للمجلس التشريعي الكيني في عام 2013 عن مقاطعة كوسيمو.

تخرجت لوبيتا من كلية هامبشاير في الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية حيث كانت تدرس السينما والمسرح هناك، وشاركت في العمل مع فريق اﻹنتاج في فيلمي The Constant Gardener مع المخرج البرازيلي فيرناندو ميريليز، و The Namesake مع المخرجة الهندية ميرا ناير.

عادت لوبيتا للجامعة مرة أخرى عندما انضمت إلى مدرسة يال للدراما، وفور تخرجها، تم اختيارها للاشتراك في فيلم 12 Years a Slave ونالت العديد من الجوائز والترشيحات من جمعيات النقاد الأمريكية عن دورها في الفيلم.
data.name: لوبيتا نيونقو

Lupita Amondi Nyong’o (Mexikóváros, 1983. március 1. –) Oscar-díjas kenyai származású mexikói színésznő.

Mexikóvárosban született a kenyai politikus és oktató Peter Anyang’ Nyong’o lányaként, egyéves korától Kenyában nevelkedett. Az Egyesült Államokban járt iskolába, filmes és színművészeti szakon szerzett diplomát a Hampshire College-ben.

Hollywoodi karrierjét produkciós asszisztensként kezdte. Első színészi szerepét a 2008-as East River című rövidfilmben kapta, ezután visszatért Kenyába, ahol a Shuga című televíziós sorozatban játszott 2009 és 2012 között. 2009-ben írója, producere és rendezője volt az In My Genes című dokumentumfilmnek. Ezt követően a Yale School of Drama színművészeti iskolában mesterfokon diplomázott. Nem sokkal ezután megkapta első komoly filmes szerepét Steve McQueen 12 év rabszolgaság című 2013-as történelmi drámájában, ahol Patseyt, a rabszolganőt játszotta. Alakításáért számos kritikai elismerést kapott, valamint Oscar-díjat ért számára a legjobb női mellékszereplő kategóriában. Ő lett az első kenyai származású és az első mexikói születésű színésznő aki Oscar-díjat vehetett át.

A Broadwayn 2015-ben debütált az Eclipsed című, kritikailag igen sikeres darabban, egy árva tinédzserlány szerepében, alakításáért Tony-díjra jelölték. A 2015-ös Star Wars VII. rész – Az ébredő Erő című kasszasikerben Maz Kanata szerepébe bújt, akit motion capture technológia segítségével személyesített meg, 2016-ban pedig A dzsungel könyvében szinkronizálta Rakshát, a farkast. 2018-ban a Fekete Párduc című Marvel-szuperhősfilmben láthatta a közönség Nakia szerepében.

A színészkedésen túl Nyong’o lelkes aktivista, támogatja a műemlékvédelmet, kiáll a nemi erőszak ellen, valamint a nők és az állatok jogaiért. 2014-ben a People magazin a legszebb nőnek választotta. 2019-ben csillagot kapott a Hollywood Walk of Fame-en.

💥Лупита Амонди Нионго. Родилась в 1983-ем году в Мехико, Мексика. Росла в семье с 5-ью братьями и сёстрами. Отец работал политиком, а мать была продюсером. Училась в Йельской школе драмы. Работает актрисой и продюсером. Личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🏆Главные награды🏆: Оскар (2014) [12 лет рабства], BAFTA (2014) [12 лет рабства], Гильдия киноактёров США (2014) [12 лет рабства], Тони (2024) [Suffs]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «12 лет рабства» (2013), «Тихое место: День первый» (2024), «Книга джунглей» (2016), «Чёрная пантера» (2018), «Мы» (2019)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Лупита сознательно отказывалась от ролей, усиливающих стереотипы, и стала одной из первых актрис, открыто повлиявших на стандарты репрезентации и цвета кожи в современном Голливуде

data.biography: David Alvarez (born May 11, 1994) is a Canadian dancer and actor, best known for being one of the original Billys in the Broadway production of Billy Elliot the Musical and becoming one of the youngest winners of the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in a Musical. He trained as a dancer with American Ballet Theatre and plays Bernardo in Steven Spielberg's 2021 film version of West Side Story.

data.biography: 大卫·阿尔瓦雷斯（David Alvarez，1994年5月11日-）是一位加拿大舞蹈家和演员，以在百老汇制作的音乐剧《比利·艾略特》中扮演的比利之一而闻名，并成为托尼奖音乐剧最佳男主角最年轻的获奖者之一。他曾在美国芭蕾舞剧院接受舞蹈训练，并在史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格 2021 年的电影版《西区故事》中扮演贝尔纳多。
data.name: 大卫·阿尔瓦雷斯

data.biography: 大衞·阿爾瓦雷斯（David Alvarez，1994 年 5 月 11 日-）是一位加拿大舞蹈家和演員，以在百老匯制作的音樂劇《比利·艾略特》中扮演的比利之一而聞名，並成為託尼獎音樂劇最佳男主角最年輕的獲獎者之一。他曾在美國芭蕾舞劇院接受舞蹈訓練，並在史蒂文·斯皮爾伯格 2021 年的電影版《夢斷城西》中扮演貝爾納多。
data.name: 大衞·阿爾瓦雷斯

data.biography:
Michelle Johnston, a highly sought-after director, choreographer, and movement coach, has over 20 years of experience in the business. In front of the camera or behind it, Michelle always brings her experience and expertise to the table. Michelle’s latest directorial work is the Nickelodeon made-for-TV movie, “Blurt”, starring Jace Norman and JoJo Siwa. She also recently directed and produced the 2016 film, “A Cinderella Story: If the Shoe Fits” for Freeform and Disney Channel. Her work as a choreographer can be seen on television in such shows as “Castle”, “Mistresses”, “Parks & Recreation”, “American Dreams”, and “Mad Men”, and in films like “A Cinderella Story”, “The Curious Case of Benjamin Button”, and “Gangster Squad”. Michelle has also worked with such stars as Jane Krakowski, Keanu Reeves, Brad Pitt, Cate Blanchett, Demi Moore, and John Travolta to name a few.

Michelle served as choreographer on Madonna’s “Who’s That Girl” World Tour and segments of the “Girlie Show” World Tour which took her career to a whole new level. She has worked with artists like Alicia Keys, Ritchie Sambora, Lil’ Kim, Hillary Duff, and Kelly Rowland. Michelle has also been in demand in the Broadway scene, working with Oscar nominated actress, Lesley Ann Warren in “Dream” as well as touring with the Tony Award winning show, “Fosse” in one of the lead roles. Michelle continues to find new and exciting venues in which to develop and showcase her broad scope of talent.
data.name: Michelle Johnston

data.biography:
Derek Siow is a film and television actor and has appeared in feature films such as Angel Has Fallen, The Beekeeper and Zero Dark Thirty. He appeared in the TV thriller The Fear Index opposite Josh Hartnett and was also in the main cast of the animation TV series The Skinner Boys for 2 seasons

Derek is also known for voicing numerous video games including Rise Of The Ronin, Dead Island 2, Star Wars: Battlefront 2, Horizon Forbidden West, Skull and Bones, Gears Tactics, Battlefield V, Guitar Hero Live and as Ashton Anchors in Star Ocean: Anamnesis.

His Hollywood feature film debut came in the Academy-Award winning Zero Dark Thirty where he worked with Kathryn Bigelow in a small role as an interrogator. He would go on to appear as US Marine Tony Song in Brad Pitt's War Machine alongside Will Poulter, LaKeith Stanfield and Hopper Penn. He played wealthy investor Jay Lee in The Rezort. He had a key role as an ex-military hacker in Angel Has Fallen alongside Danny Huston and portrayed CIA agent Gene Wilcox opposite Thandiwe Newton in the thriller All The Old Knives. Derek played the leader of a triad gang in Batgirl which he played opposite J.K. Simmons (Commissioner Gordon) and also as Detective Chen opposite Jason Statham in The Beekeeper.

Derek has appeared in TV shows including The Fear Index (opposite Josh Hartnett) as Lin Ju-Long, the CFO of a tech company. He played Andy Sim, a press officer for the police force in The Capture and also appeared in American Odyssey as Salter, an American special forces soldier.

Derek trained at the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art in London and also regularly attended classes at the Ivana Chubbuck Studio.
data.name: Derek Siow

朱雨辰，1979年2月27日生于中国上海市，中国内地男演员。2002年毕业于中央戏剧学院98级表演系，签约北京拾捌文化经纪有限公司。

2007年与佟大为、文章主演赵宝刚导演的电视剧《奋斗》；2009年与陆毅、王珞丹主演赵宝刚导演的电视剧《我的青春谁做主》；2010年与姚晨主演爱情片《摇摆de婚约》，与张静初主演短片《爱在微博蔓延时》；2011年与宋丹丹、赵宝刚合演电视剧《家的N次方》，饰演剧中男一号；2012年与马苏主演《小夫妻时代》。有钢琴十级造诣，曾为多部电视剧创作插曲。

2008年获得中华慈善总会颁发的"最具慈善精神艺人"奖；2009年获得“时尚先生”盛典最受媒体关注男演员大奖；2010年获得“中国影响2009时尚盛典”年度荧屏男主角奖；2013年获得第六届上海大学生电视节“最受欢迎男演员”奖。2015年11月4日，朱雨辰主演的《反恐特战队》登陆东方卫视、重庆卫视。2016年，参演电影《我的特工爷爷》。
data.name: 朱雨辰

data.biography:
Anthony "Tony" Curran (born 13 December 1969) is a Scottish actor.

Curran was born in Glasgow, Scotland. He is an alumnus of Holyrood Secondary School and is a graduate of the Royal Scottish Academy of Music and Drama.

Tony rose to fame in the BBC television series This Life. Since then, the Scots star has appeared in a number of major film and television roles.

Some of his roles have included The Invisible Man in The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen. To portray the Invisible Man, he donned a special suit that turned him into a walking bluescreen (according to his commentary on the DVD, he looked like a "smurf on acid"). Curran also played the vampire named Priest in Guillermo del Toro's Blade II.

Curran is active in participating in marathons to raise money for charity. He is a keen fan of Celtic Football Club.

He is a frequent and popular participant in the annual Dressed To Kilt event in New York City, run by the organization Friends of Scotland in celebration of Tartan Week.

In April, 2009 Curran revealed to the Daily Record newspaper that he is playing the role of Lieutenant Delcourt, in The Adventures of Tintin: Secret of the Unicorn, due to be released in 2011.

Curran played the painter Vincent Van Gogh, in the Doctor Who episode "Vincent and the Doctor", written by Richard Curtis. He also made a cameo appearance in "The Pandorica Opens".
data.name: Tony Curran

data.biography: Urodził się i wychował w Glasgow, mieście w północnej części Wielkiej Brytanii, w Szkocji. W wieku 16 lat porzucił szkołę i przeniósł się do Nowego Jorku, gdzie rozpoczął karierę aktorską. Zadebiutował w 1993 roku w komedii fantastycznej "Being Human" (video, TVP: "Być człowiekiem") u boku Robina Williamsa. Wystąpił m.in. w filmach: "Blade 2", "Pearl Harbor" (2001), "Gladiator" (2000) i "13-ty wojownik" (1999). W telewizji wystąpił w serialach: "Ultimate Force" (2002) jako sierżant Pete Twamley, "Menace" (2002). Zagrał w filmach: "Rowerzysta" (1999), "Wielkie nadzieje" (TV, 1999) i "Liga niezwykłych dżentelmenów"(2003).

Curran出生于苏格兰格拉斯哥。他是荷里路德中学的校友，毕业于苏格兰皇家音乐与戏剧学院。

托尼在 BBC 电视连续剧《今生》中声名鹊起。从那时起，这位苏格兰明星出现在许多主要的电影和电视角色中。

他的一些角色包括《非凡绅士联盟》中的隐形人。为了描绘隐形人，他穿上了一套特殊的西装，把他变成了一个行走的蓝屏（根据他对DVD的评论，他看起来像一个“酸上的蓝精灵”）。柯伦还在吉列尔莫·德尔·托罗的《刀锋战士 II》中扮演了名叫牧师的吸血鬼。

Curran积极参加马拉松比赛，为慈善事业筹集资金。他是凯尔特人足球俱乐部的狂热粉丝。

他经常参加纽约市一年一度的 Dressed To Kilt 活动，该活动由苏格兰之友组织举办，以庆祝格子呢周。

2009年4月，柯伦向《每日记录报》透露，他将在《丁丁历险记：独角兽的秘密》中扮演德尔考特中尉的角色，该片将于2011年上映。

柯伦在理查德·柯蒂斯（Richard Curtis）撰写的《神秘博士》剧集《文森特与医生》中扮演画家文森特·梵高。他还在《潘多里卡公开赛》中客串演出。
data.name: 托尼·库兰

data.biography:
Anthony “Tony” Curran（1969 年 12 月 13 日-）是蘇格蘭演員。

Curran 出生於蘇格蘭格拉斯哥。他是荷裏路德中學的校友，畢業於蘇格蘭皇家音樂與戲劇學院。

託尼在 BBC 電視聯續劇《今生》中聲名鵲起。從那時起，這位蘇格蘭明星出現在許多主要的電影和電視角色中。

他的一些角色包括《非凡紳士聯盟》中的隱形人。為了描繪隱形人，他穿上了一套特殊的西裝，把他變成了一個行走的藍屏（根據他對 DVD 的評論，他看起來像一個“酸上的藍精靈”）。柯倫還在吉列爾莫·德爾·託羅的《刀鋒戰士 II》中扮演了名叫牧師的吸血鬼。

Curran 積極參加馬拉松比賽，為慈善事業籌集資金。他是凱爾特人足球俱樂部的狂熱粉絲。

他經常參加紐約市一年一度的 Dressed To Kilt 活動，該活動由蘇格蘭之友組織舉辦，以慶祝格子呢周。

2009 年 4 月，柯倫向《每日記錄報》透露，他將在《丁丁歷險記：獨角獸的秘密》中扮演德爾考特中尉的角色，該片將於 2011 年上映。

柯倫在理查德·柯蒂斯（Richard Curtis）撰寫的《神秘博士》劇集《文森特與醫生》中扮演畫家文森特·梵高。他還在《潘多裏卡公開賽》中客串演出。
data.name: 託尼·庫蘭

data.biography:
Карран родился в Глазго, Шотландия. Учился в католической школе Holyrood Secondary School. Окончил Королевскую шотландскую академию музыки и драмы (англ. Royal Scottish Academy of Music and Drama).

В 17 лет начал сниматься на телевидении. На широком экране впервые появился в 1994 в фильме «Быть человеком» вместе с Юэном МакГрегором. В том же году появился в дебютном фильме Дэнни Бойла «Неглубокая могила». В 1995 сыграл в драме Майкла Уинтерботтома «Вперёд». Также снимался в роли воина-музыканта Уита в фильме «13-й воин» в 1999.

Прорывом для актёра стала роль вампира «Жреца» в боевике «Блэйд 2». Позднее актёр снова сыграл вампира, Маркуса Корвинуса, в культовом фильме «Другой мир: Эволюция». В 2003 Карран получил роль Человека-невидимки в «Лиге выдающихся джентльменов». Во время съёмок актёр носил специальный костюм, который выглядел на экране, как размытое пятно, создавая эффект невидимости персонажа.

В 2006 Карран исполнил главную роль в фильме «Красная дорога» и получил премию BAFTA Scotland и Премию британского независимого кино.

С 2013 по 2015 год играл одну из центральных ролей (Дэйтак Тарр) в сериале телеканала Syfy Universal «Вызов». Карран также играл в недолго просуществовавшем комедийном сериале ужасов «Безбашенные» в 2016.
data.name: Тони Карран

May mắn thay, anh gặp được người con gái mà anh cho rằng có thể "trị liệu" cho "căn bệnh" của mình là Song Song. Ban đầu, Tề Huân tiếp cận Song Song vì chỉ muốn xác minh cô chính là người mà anh tìm kiếm bấy lâu. Sau những lần gặp gỡ, anh phát hiện bản thân mình không biết từ lúc nào đã yêu Song Song. Đồng thời, những bí mật của gia tộc đời trước dần được hé lộ. Đứng trước những ân oán vướng mắc, ái hận tình thù, Tề Huân và Song Song rồi sẽ ra sao?

data.biography:
Milena Radulovic wurde 1995 in Belgrad, Serbien geboren. Ab der sechsten Grundschulklasse war sie Mitglied des Theaterstudios von Miroslav Mike Aleksic. Sie besuchte das vierte Belgrader Gymnasium und absolvierte die Fakultät für darstellende Kunst in Belgrad. Sie schloss 2017 mit dem besten Durchschnitt (9,46) in der Klasse von Biljana Masic ab. Sie nahm an Latein- und Standardtänzen teil, übte Tennis und Schwimmen und beherrschte auch das Skifahren und Tauchen.

Ihre erste Rolle bekam sie nach Abschluss ihres ersten Studienjahres in der Fernsehserie "One Summer Night" unter der Regie von Ivan Stefanovic nach dem Roman "Das war eine Nacht an der Adria" von Milica Jakovljevic (Mir-Jam). Unmittelbar danach erhielt sie auch die Rolle der Prinzessin Hlif Zi Ho in der von RTS produzierten Kinderserie "Space Princess". Nach dem Abschluss folgten Rollen in den Zwergen von den Titelseiten und in den Serien Besa, Pet und The Civil Servant. Anfang 2019 gab sie ihr Debüt als Krankenschwester Jasna in der russisch-serbischen Produktion Balkan Border, die von 20th Century Fox und Archangel Studios vertrieben wurde.
Milena Radulovic was born on January 29, 1995 in Belgrade, Serbia. She is an actress, known for Drzavni sluzbenik (2019), The Superdeep (2020) and An Ordinary Man (2017).

Daniel Mays was born on March 31, 1978 in Epping, Essex, England as Daniel Alan Mays. He is an actor, known for The Adventures of Tintin: The Secret of the Unicorn (2011), The Bank Job (2008) and Atonement (2007). He has performed five plays at the Royal Court Theatre in London including two in the theatre's 50th Anniversary year in parts that were specifically written for him. He won the Best Actor prize at the Palmare Television Festival 2003 for his performance in the hard hitting improvised BBC film Rehab. He has made two films with the acclaimed British director Mike Leigh. All or Nothing (2002) and the 1950s abortion drama, Vera Drake (2004), which received 3 Academy Award Nominations, the Golden Lion Award for Best Film, 3 Bafta Awards and 6 British Independent Film Awards including Best British Independent Film. Son of Toni Mays.
data.name: Daniel Mays

data.biography: Daniel Mays werd op 31 maart 1978 geboren in Epping, Essex, Engeland als Daniel Alan Mays. Hij is een acteur, bekend van The Adventures of Tintin: The Secret of the Unicorn (2011), The Bank Job (2008) en Atonement (2007). Hij speelde vijf toneelstukken in het Royal Court Theatre in Londen, waaronder twee in het 50-jarig jubileumjaar van het theater in delen die speciaal voor hem waren geschreven. Hij won de prijs voor beste acteur op het Palmare Television Festival 2003 voor zijn optreden in de keiharde geïmproviseerde BBC-film Rehab. Hij heeft twee films gemaakt met de veelgeprezen Britse regisseur Mike Leigh. All or Nothing (2002) en het abortusdrama uit de jaren 50, Vera Drake (2004), dat 3 Academy Award-nominaties, de Golden Lion Award voor beste film, 3 Bafta Awards en 6 British Independent Film Awards ontving, waaronder die voor beste Britse onafhankelijke film. Zoon van Toni Mays.

丹尼尔·梅斯（Daniel Mays）于1978年3月31日出生于英国埃塞克斯郡埃平，原名丹尼尔·艾伦·梅斯。他是一名演员，以《丁丁历险记：独角兽的秘密》（2011）、《银行工作》（2008）和《赎罪》（2007）而闻名。他曾在伦敦皇家宫廷剧院演出过五部戏剧，其中两部是在剧院成立50周年之际演出的，其中部分是专门为他写的。2003年，他凭借在BBC即兴电影《康复》中的表演获得了2003年帕尔马雷电视节最佳男演员奖。他与著名英国导演迈克·利（Mike Leigh）合作拍摄了两部电影。孤注一掷（2002）和1950年代的堕胎剧《维拉·德雷克》（2004），获得3项奥斯卡金像奖提名、金狮奖最佳影片奖、3项英国电影学院奖和6项英国独立电影奖，包括最佳英国独立电影奖。他是托尼·梅斯的儿子。

data.biography:
Daniel Alan Mays, 31 Mart 1978 tarihinde Epping, Essex, İngiltere'de elektrikçi bir baba ve banka memuru bir annenin üçüncü çocuğu olarak dünyaya gelmiştir. Essex'te büyüyen Mays, oyunculuğa olan ilgisiyle İtalya Sanatları Tiyatro Okulu'na (Italia Conti Academy of Theatre Arts) katıldı ve ardından prestijli Kraliyet Dramatik Sanatlar Akademisi'nden (RADA) 2000 yılında mezun oldu. Profesyonel kariyerine tiyatro ve televizyondaki küçük rollerle başlayan aktör, İngiliz gerçekçi sinemasının usta yönetmeni Mike Leigh ile kurduğu iş birliği sayesinde sektörde sağlam bir yer edindi. Leigh'in yönettiği "All or Nothing" (2002) ve Venedik Film Festivali'nde Altın Aslan kazanan "Vera Drake" (2004) filmlerindeki performanslarıyla eleştirmenlerin dikkatini çekti ve "karakter oyunculuğu" konusundaki yeteneğini erken dönemde kanıtladı.

2000'lerin ortalarında hem sinemada hem de televizyonda yükselişe geçen Mays, Joe Wright'ın "Kefaret" (Atonement) (2007) ve Jason Statham'lı suç filmi "Banka İşi" (The Bank Job) (2008) gibi popüler yapımlarda yer aldı. Televizyonda ise kült dizi "Ashes to Ashes"ın (2010) son sezonunda canlandırdığı gizemli Jim Keats karakteriyle geniş kitlelerce tanındı. Steven Spielberg'ün "Tenten'in Maceraları" (2011) filminde seslendirme yaparak ve "Bizans" (Byzantium) (2012) gibi filmlerle kariyerini çeşitlendirdi. Ancak Daniel Mays'in kariyerindeki en büyük övgüleri topladığı performanslarından biri, BBC'nin fenomen polisiyesi "Line of Duty"nin (2016) üçüncü sezonunda canlandırdığı Çavuş Danny Waldron rolü oldu. Bu rolüyle BAFTA TV Ödülleri'nde En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında aday gösterildi.

Büyük bütçeli Hollywood yapımlarında da kilit yan roller üstlenen Mays, "Rogue One: A Star Wars Story" (2016) filminde direnişçi Tivik karakteriyle Star Wars evrenine girdi. Sam Mendes'in I. Dünya Savaşı draması "1917" (2019) filminde ise ana karakterlere o meşhur görevi tebliğ eden ve onları Blake'in kardeşini bulmaya gönderen Çavuş Sanders'ı canlandırdı.

Son yıllarda televizyonun en aranan yüzlerinden biri olmaya devam eden oyuncu, "Good Omens", Netflix yapımı "White Lines" (2020) ve seri katil Dennis Nilsen'ın hikayesini anlatan "Des" (2020) dizisinde David Tennant ile karşılıklı oynayarak Dedektif Peter Jay rolüyle büyük beğeni topladı. Hem komedi hem de ağır dram rollerinin altından başarıyla kalkan, "Sıradan bir İngiliz'i" canlandırmadaki doğallığıyla tanınan Mays, tiyatro sahnesinde de aktif olup, "Guys and Dolls" gibi müzikallerdeki performanslarıyla da ödüllere aday gösterilmiştir.

data.biography: Российский революционер, советский политический, государственный и партийный деятель. Председатель Совета народных комиссаров СССР в 1930-1941 годах, народный комиссар, министр иностранных дел СССР в 1939-1949, 1953-1956 годах. Один из высших руководителей ВКП(б) и КПСС с 1921 по 1957 годах. Герой Социалистического Труда (1943). Депутат Верховного Совета СССР I-IV созывов.
data.name: Вячеслав Молотов

data.biography:
Vyacheslav Mikhailovich Molotov ((OS 25 February) 9 March 1890 – 8 November 1986) was a Russian politician and diplomat, an Old Bolshevik, and a leading figure in the Soviet government from the 1920s onward. He served as Chairman of the Council of People's Commissars from 1930 to 1941 and as Minister of Foreign Affairs from 1939 to 1949 and from 1953 to 1956.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Vyacheslav Molotov, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Vyacheslav Molotov

data.biography: Viatcheslav Mikhaïlovitch Molotov (en russe : Вячеслав Михайлович Молотов ; né le 25 février 1890 (9 mars 1890 dans le calendrier grégorien) et mort le 8 novembre 1986) est un homme politique et diplomate soviétique. Chef du gouvernement de l'URSS de 1930 à 1941, ministre des Affaires étrangères jusqu'en 1949, membre titulaire du Politburo de 1926 à 1957, il est considéré comme le bras droit de Joseph Staline. Il demeure un membre influent du Parti communiste de l'Union soviétique jusqu'à son éviction, lors de la déstalinisation.

data.biography:
Katherine „Kate“ Burton (* 10. September 1957 in Genf, Schweiz) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Burton debütierte an der Seite ihres Vaters, Richard Burton, im Historiendrama Königin für tausend Tage aus dem Jahr 1969, wurde jedoch nicht im Abspann erwähnt. In der Actionkomödie Big Trouble in Little China (1986) spielte sie an der Seite von Kurt Russell und Kim Cattrall eine der größeren Rollen. Ihr Auftritt in der Fernsehserie Junge Schicksale (ABC Afterschool Specials) im Jahr 1995 brachte ihr 1996 den Daytime Emmy Award.

Als Theaterdarstellerin wurde Burton im Jahr 2002 für ihre Rollen in den Stücken Hedda Gabler und The Elephant Man für zwei Tony Awards nominiert.[2] Im Fernsehthriller Besessen (2002) übernahm sie neben Jenna Elfman eine der Hauptrollen. Im Filmdrama Empire Falls (2005) spielte sie die Rolle der Tochter der Chefin von Miles Roby (Ed Harris), die in diesen jahrelang verliebt ist. Im Thriller Stay (2005) trat sie neben Ewan McGregor, Ryan Gosling und Naomi Watts in einer größeren Rolle auf. Ihre seit 2005 gespielte Rolle der Ellis Grey in der Fernsehserie Grey’s Anatomy brachte ihr 2006 und 2007 jeweils eine Nominierung für den Emmy. In der Serie Scandal spielte sie von 2012 bis 2018 – ebenfalls, wie Grey's Anatomy, von Shonda Rhimes – die Rolle der Sally Langston, für die sie 2014 wieder für den Emmy nominiert wurde.

data.biography:
Katherine "Kate" Burton, 10 Eylül 1957 tarihinde Cenevre, İsviçre'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Efsanevi Galli aktör Richard Burton ve yapımcı Sybil Williams'ın kızı olarak tiyatro ve sinema dünyasının tam kalbinde doğan Burton, aynı zamanda Elizabeth Taylor'ın üvey kızıdır. Brown Üniversitesi'nde Rus Çalışmaları ve Avrupa Tarihi üzerine lisans eğitimini tamamladıktan sonra, babasının izinden giderek Yale School of Drama'da oyunculuk eğitimi almış ve buradan yüksek lisans derecesiyle mezun olmuştur.

Profesyonel kariyerine 1980'lerin başında Broadway sahnelerinde adım atan Kate Burton, tiyatro dünyasının en saygın isimlerinden biri haline gelmiştir. "Present Laughter", "Hedda Gabler" ve "The Constant Wife" gibi oyunlardaki performanslarıyla üç kez Tony Ödülü'ne aday gösterilerek sahne sanatlarındaki ustalığını kanıtlamıştır.

Sinema kariyerinde "Küçük Çin'de Büyük Bela" (Big Trouble in Little China) (1986) ve "Buz Fırtınası" (The Ice Storm) (1997) gibi filmlerle yer edinmeye başlayan Burton, Adrian Lyne'ın yönettiği "Sadakatsiz" (Unfaithful) (2002) filminde Tracy karakterini canlandırmıştır. Ayrıca Danny Boyle'un "127 Saat" (127 Hours) (2010) filminde Aron Ralston'ın annesi rolüyle ve "Max Payne" (2008) filmindeki performansıyla beyazperdede boy göstermiştir.

Ancak Kate Burton'ı modern izleyici kitlesi için unutulmaz kılan asıl başarıları televizyon dünyasındadır. Shonda Rhimes'ın uzun soluklu medikal draması "Grey's Anatomy"de (2005-günümüz) canlandırdığı, başkarakter Meredith Grey'in Alzheimer hastası, dahi cerrah annesi Dr. Ellis Grey rolü, televizyon tarihinin en etkileyici performanslarından biri olarak kabul edilir. Bu rolüyle iki kez Emmy Ödülü'ne aday gösterilmiştir. Benzer bir başarıyı, yine Shonda Rhimes yapımı olan politik gerilim dizisi "Scandal"da (2012-2018) canlandırdığı muhafazakar ve hırslı Başkan Yardımcısı Sally Langston karakteriyle tekrarlamış ve bir Emmy adaylığı daha kazanmıştır.

Kariyeri boyunca "The Good Wife", "Veep", "This Is Us" ve "Homeland" gibi prestijli dizilerde konuk oyuncu olarak yer alan Burton, son dönemde "Inventing Anna" (2022) dizisinde Nora Radford karakterine hayat vermiştir. Hem sahnede hem de ekranda güçlü, karmaşık ve otoriter kadın karakterleri canlandırmadaki yeteneğiyle tanınan usta oyuncu, kariyerine aktif olarak devam etmektedir.

Xosha Kai Roquemore (/ˈzoʊʃə ˈroʊkmɔːr/ ZOH-shə ROHK-mor; born December 11, 1984) is an American actress. She is best known for her roles as Jo Ann in Precious and Tamra in The Mindy Project.

Roquemore was born in 1984 in Los Angeles and is named after the Xhosa people of South Africa. She started acting when she joined The Amazing Grace Conservatory in ninth grade. After graduating from high school, she moved to New York City and graduated from the Tisch program at New York University.

Roquemore starred in her first major film as Jo Ann in Precious. In 2013, she was cast in a recurring role on Kirstie, based on her work in the series pilot. Her role, however, was recast after she was added as a series regular to The Mindy Project after a three-episode guest star stint.

Roquemore was in a relationship with actor LaKeith Stanfield in August 2015. In March 2017, the couple announced Roquemore's pregnancy. Roquemore and Stanfield broke up after the birth of their daughter.

data.biography: Xosha Kai Roquemore (/ˈzoʊʃə ˈroʊkmɔːr/ ZOH-shə ROHK-mor; nacida el 11 de diciembre de 1984) es una actriz estadounidense. Es mejor conocida por sus papeles de Jo Ann en Precious y Tamra en The Mindy Project. Roquemore nació en 1984 en Los Ángeles y lleva el nombre del pueblo xhosa de Sudáfrica.  Comenzó a actuar cuando se unió a The Amazing Grace Conservatory en noveno grado. Después de graduarse de la escuela secundaria, se mudó a la ciudad de Nueva York y se graduó del programa Tisch en la Universidad de Nueva York. Roquemore protagonizó su primera película importante como Jo Ann en Precious. En el 2013, fue elegida para un papel recurrente en Kirstie, basado en su trabajo en el piloto de la serie. Su papel, sin embargo, fue reelegido después de que se agregara como regular a la serie The Mindy Project después de un período de estrella invitada de tres episodios. Roquemore estuvo en una relación con el actor LaKeith Stanfield en agosto de 2015. En marzo de 2017, la pareja anunció el embarazo de Roquemore. Roquemore y Stanfield se separaron después del nacimiento de su hija.

Xosha Kai Roquemore (/ˈzoʊʃə ˈroʊkmɔːr/ ZOH-shə ROHK-mor; ur. 11 grudnia 1984) jest amerykańską aktorką. Najbardziej znana jest z ról Jo Ann w Hej, skarbie i Tamry w Świat według Mindy.

Roquemore urodziła się w 1984 roku w Los Angeles i została nazwana na cześć ludu Xhosa z Południowej Afryki. Zaczęła grać, gdy dołączyła do The Amazing Grace Conservatory w dziewiątej klasie. Po ukończeniu szkoły średniej przeprowadziła się do Nowego Jorku i ukończyła program Tisch na New York University.

Roquemore zagrała w swoim pierwszym dużym filmie jako Jo Ann w Hej, skarbie. W 2013 roku została obsadzona w powtarzającej się roli w Kirstie, na podstawie jej pracy w pilocie serialu. Jej rola została jednak przeniesiona, gdy została dodana jako stała członkini serialu Świat według Mindy po występie gościnnym w trzech odcinkach.

Roquemore była w związku z aktorem LaKeithem Stanfieldem w sierpniu 2015 r. W marcu 2017 r. para ogłosiła ciążę Roquemore. Roquemore i Stanfield rozstali się po narodzinach córki.

data.biography:
Samuel Eto'o Fils (born 10 March 1981) is a Cameroonian retired professional footballer who played as a striker. In his prime, Eto'o was regarded by pundits as one of the best strikers in the world, and he is regarded as one of the greatest African players of all time, winning the African Player of the Year a record four times: in 2003, 2004, 2005, and 2010.

A precocious talent, Eto'o moved to Real Madrid as a 16 year old. Due to competition in his position with more experienced players, he had several loan spells, before signing for Mallorca in 2000 where he scored 70 goals. His impressive form saw him join Barcelona in 2004 where he scored 130 goals in five seasons and also became the record holder for the most appearances by an African player in La Liga. Winning La Liga three times, he was a key member of the Barcelona attack, alongside Ronaldinho, that won the 2006 UEFA Champions League Final, with Eto'o scoring in the final, and was part of a front three of Lionel Messi and Thierry Henry that won the 2009 UEFA Champions League Final, with Eto'o again scoring in the final. He is the second player in history to score in two UEFA Champions League finals. At Barcelona, Eto'o came in third for the FIFA World Player of the Year in 2005 and was twice named in the FIFA FIFPro World XI, in 2005 and 2006.

He signed with Inter Milan for the 2009-10 season, where he became the first player to win two European continental trebles following his back-to-back achievements with Barcelona and Inter. He is the fourth player in Champions League history, after Marcel Desailly, Paulo Sousa, and Gerard Piqué, to have won the trophy two years in a row with different teams. After brief spells with Anzhi Makhachkala, Chelsea, Everton, and Sampdoria, Eto'o found prolific form again in the Süper Lig with Antalyaspor having scored 44 goals in 76 league games. In 2015, he received the Golden Foot Award.

As a member of the Cameroon national team, Eto'o was a part of the squad that won the Gold Medal at the 2000 Olympics. He also won the Africa Cup of Nations in 2000 and 2002. Eto'o has participated in four World Cups and six Africa Cup of Nations. Eto'o announced his retirement from international football in August 2014.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Adam Spiegel (born October 22, 1969), known professionally as Spike Jonze, is an American director, producer and actor, whose work includes music videos, commercials, film and television. He is best known for his collaborations with writer Charlie Kaufman, which include the 1999 film Being John Malkovich and the 2002 film Adaptation., and for his work as director of the 2009 film Where the Wild Things Are. data.biography:
Madison Wolfe, 16 Ekim 2002 tarihinde Metairie, Louisiana, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Çocukluk yıllarını doğduğu yerde geçiren ve yine kendisi gibi oyuncu olan Meghan Wolfe'un ablası olan Madison, performans sanatlarına erken yaşta ilgi duymaya başladı. Henüz ilkokul çağındayken oyunculuk kariyerine adım atan Wolfe, ilk sinema deneyimini 2012 yılında "Yolda" (On the Road) ve Will Ferrell ile Zach Galifianakis'in başrollerini paylaştığı komedi filmi "Kampanya" (The Campaign) ile yaşadı. Bu ilk adımlar, onun genç yaşta büyük setlerde tecrübe kazanmasını sağladı.

Televizyon dünyasında dikkatleri üzerine çekmesi, eleştirmenlerce övülen ve kült statüsüne erişen HBO dizisi "True Detective"in ilk sezonunda (2014) canlandırdığı Audrey Hart rolüyle oldu. Dizide Woody Harrelson'ın karakterinin kızı olarak sergilediği performans, daha büyük projelerin kapısını araladı. Bu dönemde ayrıca David O. Russell'ın yönettiği "Joy" (2015) ve Bryan Cranston'lı "Trumbo" (2015) gibi prestijli yapımlarda yan roller üstlenerek sektördeki yerini sağlamlaştırdı.

Madison Wolfe'un kariyerindeki asıl dönüm noktası ve onu uluslararası alanda geniş kitlelere tanıtan yapım, James Wan'ın yönettiği korku filmi "Korku Seansı 2" (The Conjuring 2) (2016) oldu. Filmde, Enfield Poltergeist olayının merkezindeki Janet Hodgson karakterini canlandıran Wolfe, sergilediği inandırıcı, duygusal ve ürkütücü performansla eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı. Amerikalı olmasına rağmen bu rol için kusursuz bir İngiliz aksanı kullanan genç oyuncu, filmin başarısında kilit bir rol oynadı.

Bu büyük başarının ardından Wolfe, başrol sorumluluğunu üstlenebileceğini kanıtladığı fantastik drama filmi "Dev Avcısı" (I Kill Giants) (2017) ile izleyici karşısına çıktı. Beğenilen bir grafik romandan uyarlanan bu filmde, gerçek hayatın zorluklarından kaçmak için hayali devlerle savaşan Barbara Thorson karakterine hayat vererek dramatik derinliğini ve oyunculuk yelpazesinin genişliğini kanıtladı. Sonraki yıllarda James Wan ile tekrar bir araya geldiği korku gerilim filmi "Malignant" (2021) filminde Serena May karakterini canlandırdı. Genç yaşına rağmen korku, drama ve komedi türlerinde gösterdiği çok yönlülükle Hollywood'un gelecek vaat eden yeteneklerinden biri olarak kariyerine devam etmektedir.
